consolidation: 13 tabs → 4 content files + dialogue summary + OpKit
key_blockers: All marine plasma supplier data is [VOID — requires human outreach in Week 1-2]
COGS validation blocked until supplier quotes received
MOQ and lead time assumptions unconfirmed (based on industry research)

next_action: Execute supplier outreach campaign (Biocean, Actimar, Quinton) within Week 1-2 of Trade #84 kickoff. Confirm FDA registration, MOQ, pricing, lead time, exclusivity status. Apply Supplier Evaluation Scorecard. Select primary + backup supplier by Week 3.

Reorder MOQ flexibility (assumed 50-75% of first order, negotiate in contract)
Microplastics testing availability (optional differentiator, not blocking)

revisions.what_changed: Workshopped M6 Supply Chain through full TWP-001 protocol. 13 Danilo tabs (4 with structure, 9 void/minimal) consolidated into 4 production files: supplier_research_and_landscape.md (comprehensive supplier vetting, evaluation criteria, outreach templates, COGS calculation, backup plan), ocean_sourcing.md (marine plasma sourcing geography, depth strategy, supplier-specific sources, IonWave positioning), quality_control_and_coa.md (FDA/Prop 65 COA requirements, batch tracking, supplier quality protocol, recall plan), restock_framework.md (reorder point formula, order quantity, demand forecasting, cash flow integration, stress test scenarios). 6-round expert dialogue with 3 personas (Operations Expert, Skeptical Investor, Regulatory Auditor) produced 12 upgrades addressing supplier backup timing, COGS kill criteria, safety stock adequacy, COA pre-contract validation, M13 ad spend integration. All marine plasma supplier data marked [VOID — requires human outreach] which is appropriate for pre-launch context. IonWave-specific supplier research (Biocean, Actimar, Quinton) from Danilo tab 233 integrated with industry best practices research (MOQs 2,500-10,000 units, lead times 14-18 weeks first production / 6-10 weeks reorders, private label vs contract manufacturing). OpKit (OK-M6-001) extracts generalizable method for any supplement brand (8-step process from requirements → supplier selection → COA → restock formula).
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong framework with honest pre-launch gaps. Evidence Coverage 3/5 (many VOIDs but appropriate), Confidence Honesty 5/5 (explicit A/B/C/D grades + VOIDs), Upgrade Path Quality 5/5 (actionable with blocking vs non-blocking distinction), Actionability 4/5 (PM can execute immediately, loses 1pt for data-dependency), OpKit Reusability 4/5 (generalizable method, IonWave context as graded example). Loses points on Evidence Coverage because supplier quotes pending — but this is honest and appropriate for pre-launch TUP. Will upgrade to 9-10/10 after Week 1-2 supplier outreach completes and primary/backup suppliers confirmed.

critical_upgrades: U1: Kill criteria for supplier unavailability
U4: COGS kill criteria (>$0.60 per sachet)
U8: Backup activation decision tree with time gates
